personal.name: Alex Chen
personal.bio: Passionate AI Engineer Intern specializing in Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Computer Vision. Dedicated to building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.

projects.title: Neural Vision System
projects.description: A real-time object detection and tracking system using YOLOv8 and custom-trained datasets for industrial safety monitoring.

projects.title: Semantic Search Engine
projects.description: Developed a vector-based search engine using Sentence-Transformers and Pinecone for efficient document retrieval across large datasets.

projects.title: Autonomous Drone Navigation
projects.description: Implemented reinforcement learning algorithms to enable a simulated drone to navigate complex obstacle courses autonomously.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time social media sentiment analysis tool using BERT and Streamlit for visualizing public opinion on emerging tech trends.

experience.description: Working on optimizing large language models for edge devices and conducting research on multi-modal learning.
Led a team of 5 students to develop an AI-powered campus navigation app using computer vision.

education.description: Relevant coursework: Deep Learning, Probabilistic Graphical Models, Computer Vision.
